title: LocalEncryptionProfile
description: Local encryption profile capturing the algorithm, key derivation posture, and scope for a SourceOS device's local-first data plane. Governs encrypted-at-rest and encrypted-in-transit posture for local operation logs, artifacts, and sync bundles.

deviceRef.description: DeviceIdentity URN this encryption profile is bound to.

algorithm.description: Symmetric encryption algorithm used for local data at rest.

keyDerivation.description: Key derivation or key storage mechanism.

encryptedAtRest.description: Whether local operation logs and artifacts are encrypted at rest.

encryptedInTransit.description: Whether local-to-remote and peer sync transfers are encrypted in transit.

scope.description: Data classes covered by this encryption profile. Defaults to all if omitted.

keyRef.description: Opaque key or keyslot reference. Must not include raw key material.

keyRotationPolicyRef.description: Optional policy URN governing key rotation schedule.

fipsCompliant.description: Whether the algorithm and key derivation combination is FIPS-140 compliant.
